name: PARACLETUS
tagline: REMAKE THE STRANGE INTO SOMETHING FAMILIAR
description: A living infection of strange shapes spying on our world. They seek to assimilate their foes in order to compute the Samsaran Sequence.

uniqueMechanics.name: Stained Squares
uniqueMechanics.effect: Any square may be stained through various effects. Enemies or other factions cannot build on Stained squares.

uniqueMechanics.name: Stainwalk
uniqueMechanics.effect: Stainwalk abilities are triggered when that unit occupies a stained square.

enemies.name: OROBAS
enemies.title: THE SPEAKER
enemies.description: The herald of the Paracletus and the first to pour from the Source Seed, OROBAS sees the world around it for what it could be. It does not want to kill you—it wants to free you.
attacks: Line:4. If the target is on a Stained square, deal 8 damage. Otherwise deal 3 damage.
Deal 5 damage to an adjacent unit. If it kills that creature, spawn one new miniboss of your choosing under your control.
Move any unit adjacent to any stained square onto that stained square, and deal that unit 5 damage.
enemies.agnosia: Immediately spawn any one unique fortification within 5 squares of OROBAS.
enemies.special: When OROBAS takes damage, you may increase that damage by 1 to Stain an adjacent square.
enemies.stainwalk: When on a Stained square, OROBAS moves twice as fast.

enemies.name: Eyesting Rose
enemies.description: When the Source Seed was experimenting with fractals, PRISTIR was born. Those that try to trace its patterns may lose track of its size and subsequent threat.
attacks: Increase PRISTIR's scale by 2. Any occupied spaces take 5 damage and are pushed out.
Deal 10 damage to Burst:1, then decrease PRISTIR's scale by 1.
enemies.agnosia: Increase PRISTIR's scale by 1 and PRISTIR is now Primed. Any occupied spaces take 5 damage and are pushed out.
enemies.stainwalk: When PRISTIR is on Stain, allies on connected Stained squares take 2 less damage when attacked and PRISTIR takes 2 more damage when attacked.

enemies.name: Gorgenaut
enemies.description: Formed at the Scyllan Convergence of thirteen seas, RETIARIUS is bent on consumption. By swirling its energy in a Charybdic array pattern, it generates a near-inescapable vacuum.
attacks: Cone:3. Deal 5 damage and pull any unit 1 space towards RETIARIUS.
Deal 10 damage to an adjacent unit. Move that unit to any stained square.
enemies.agnosia: Draw a 5x5 box with RETIARIUS at the center and Stain them. Pull any enemies within the box 1 square towards RETIARIUS.
enemies.stainwalk: When RETIARIUS is on a Stained square, it recovers 10 HP at the end of your turn.

enemies.name: Soaring Bombardier
enemies.description: When the stain washed over a stygian anemone, it rose to flight in the form of CHALAZAOR. Its volatile spawn are said to be irremovable when planted.
attacks: Create a Flowerbud on an adjacent square with 1 HP and Countdown:2. When the timer reaches 0, it blooms into a Stain Flower.
Deal 3 damage and Bleed:2 to an adjacent unit.
enemies.agnosia: CHALAZAOR emits a hypnotic pattern of colors that mortal eyes weren't meant to see. Countdown:10. Whenever CHALAZAOR would take damage, it takes 0 damage instead and reduces Countdown by 1. When Countdown reaches zero, CHALAZAOR dies and deals 5 damage to Burst:2.

enemies.name: Lurking Freak
enemies.description: Direct descendant of some of the first beings spawned from the Source Seed and the catalyst for the Contagion Mind, POTAGON once saw to the safety of the Seed on its journey through the rivers of Hell until it reached its nest in the depths.
attacks: Range:2, Line:4 Damage:4, and stain targeted squares.
Deal 10 damage to an adjacent unit, and target gets Pinned:1.
enemies.agnosia: POTAGON burrows into the ground and counts as Stained ground for other units to occupy.
enemies.stainwalk: When POTAGON ends its turn on a square that isn't stained, it takes 10 HP damage.

enemies.name: Scorned Eyes
enemies.description: When the Source Seed purged parasites from its body, they arose a new Stained being. The Contagion Mind deemed KATAGOS more useful, integrating them into their own sub-link of the mind network.
enemies.special: When a Swarm contains 4 or more units, a Swarm may Prime itself. Any Swarm that is Primed will destroy the entire Swarm when taking damage, leaving any spaces they occupied with the Stained condition.

enemies.name: Stain Creep
enemies.description: Sentient stain that walked before it could think. Nearby creatures will hear a constant ringing—a comfort for the Paracletus but a source of unease for everyone else.
attacks: Deal 4 damage to an adjacent creature.
enemies.special: If a Stain Creep ends its turn on a square that isn't Stained, it dies.
enemies.stainwalk: Allied units can inhabit the same square as Stain Creep.

enemies.name: Shadowing Witness
enemies.description: When the Source Seed bleeds during a hurricane, AULAEA are formed in the foamy waters. It's rumored that their intense gaze can relieve headaches in humans—an uncanny ability some see as a boon instead of an omen.
enemies.special: When AULAEA leaves a square, it counts as stained until your next turn.

enemies.name: Latent Pudding
enemies.description: In the pressures of the deep sea, compressed Paraclesal flesh will roil and condense into an AMBROID. AMBROID will sing an alien aria before they turn into a new weapon on the terrain.
enemies.special: When ending its turn on a Stained tile, Latent Pudding may transform into any Paracletus Fortification.

enemies.name: Paracletus Loom
enemies.description: The creation of Paracletal spinnerets connected to the Source Seed with a transpatial superequation can transport demons across great distances almost instantaneously. Each being in the Contagion Mind acts as a roller on a conveyor belt to move their presence along.
enemies.special: At the end of the round, Paracletus Loom gains a Charge. On the GM's turn, they may spend 1 Charge to spawn a Paracletus minion, or 5 Charges to spawn a miniboss.
